titleStmt.title: SII 28.69: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 69. (A.R. No. 67 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

Again this is in continuation of the previous two numbers. For the worship (archanaigaḷ) of Chīrāḷa-ppiḷḷaiyār in the Chiṟuttoṇḍa-dēvartirumāḷikai in Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭaṅguḍi in Marukal-nāḍu in Gēya-māṇikkavaḷanāḍu, one veli of land in Dīṉa-chintāmaṇi-chcharuppēdi-maṅgalam excluding the kāṇi land of Chikkal-uḍaiyān, and the (levies) including antarāyam, pāṭṭam, were granted as archanā-bhōga-iṟai-ili, probably on the orders of the king. The document was attested by a long list of officials as in No. 66 above. Refers to the iṟai-kaṭṭiṇa-kāṇikkaḍan opādi as determined in the year 11 of chuṅgan-tavirttaruḷina Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa-dēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 10 8varuṣam 10000 3 1000 3 100 9 10ṉāl Antarāyam pāṭṭam
Uṭpaṭṭa Aṟcaṉāpokam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku
Uḷvarippaṭi keyamāṇikka vaḷaṉāṭṭu marukal
ṉāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭic ciṟuttoṇṭa
tevar tirumāḷikaiyil cirāḷappiḷḷaiyārkku veṇ
ṭum Aṟcaṉaikaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Iṉṉāṭṭut tiṉa
cintāmaṇiccaruppeti maṅkalattuc cikkaluṭai
yāṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilam nīkki nīkki niṉṟa nilattu yāṇṭu
10 8varuṣampacāṉa mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Aṟcaṉā
poka Iṟaiyili Iṭṭarūpāy kaliṉāla nilaopāti paḻaviṟai
pon_ � 1 muntiri niccayitta Opāti pon_ �100� Uṭai
yār cuṅkantavirttaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa tevarkku [10 1 varuṣam]
Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ Opāti pon_ 100ḷaṉāl 10 6 Ākki
pon_ 10000 1000m yāṇṭu [10 8 varuṣam] pācaṉa mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭa
m Uṭpaṭa Aṟcaṉāpoka Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa
paṭikku Ivai puravuvariśrīkaraṇanāyaka melū
ruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇa
nāyakam perunallūruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu
Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻa
vaṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāya
kam kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari
śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi perumaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉe
ḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi kumāra
maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkara
ṇattu mukaveṭṭi pantaṇainallūruṭai
yāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇattu muka
veṭṭi Uḻuntaiyuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu
Ivai tīpattarayaṉeḻuttu Ivai vijaiyarā
jaṉeḻuttu Ivai paḻantiyarājaṉeḻuttu
Ivai kacciyarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai cerakoṉe
ḻuttu Ivai vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu cip
peṟṟāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai veṇāṭṭarayaṉeḻuttu
Ivai nuḷampapāṭirājaṉeḻuttu Ivai vāṇādhirāja
ṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
